name: QA 1153
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1153

Exercise the BCC PMDA xfsdist module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2018 Andreas Gerstmayr.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1153

Exercise the BCC PMDA xfsdist module - install, remove and values.

Copyright (c) 2018 Andreas Gerstmayr.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1153

Exercise the BCC PMDA xfsdist module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2018 Andreas Gerstmayr.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
